reviews.review_description: It was nice while it lasted
W game because you get mods and the music helps people focus during infection lobby’s  so wwwwwww game

Expect for the fly taggers great game Because there’s like so much cosmetics to pick from an excerpt from most of the people who be toxic fly tag. It’s a great game like I can’t have anything else to say except thank you for making this game and I’ll give us a five star. Can I also get mod please and illustrator. I also love this game and most of my friends play and I love this as well like I can’t say anything more about my friends because like right now most of them are playing a game. So thank you for making this app and I hope that there is no more one star reviews and also once somebody got banned for having your name gorilla and then they made a review about it saying oh my God Ben in the first five minutes and then and then I saw a mod going like guys watch me ban this kid but except that I really love this game. I hope you make more games in the future that I like project gorilla free thievery so thank you Also, let’s just say that I hope I get more and I hope that I am able to be friends with you one day so if you reply to this can you friend me please and we can talk about this. Thank you￼!

Other than the fly taggers,toxics it's a great game also I would like to have mod to get rid of all the fly taggers and toxics (I'm not asking for mod I mean kinda but I would make the game even more fun with all the fly taggers and the toxics)
I was in a infection lobby and I  got banned from me flying out of the map and I got banned  1  star bad

Except for the toxic players saying that I’m modding or using car monkey it’s a really good game, even though I’m just good at the game but it is still a really good game with levels and xp and 3 mod menus. I really prefer this. And if the owner gives me mod I will not abuse it,   ( not asking for mod just saying)  and I’m already reporting people who are toxic, sorry for the long paragraph I’m just saying how good this game is.
It's soo good! But when you first load in the game for the fist time change your name quick before getting banned. The 3 mod menu's are absolutely amazing! And you can play songs.
I got the game and it was awesome!!!!!!!!!I loved the mods it was fun don’t know why people was saying they got banned because I didn’t and I was playing with people and having fun
Banned for no reason whoever runs this game is an idiot and thinks he’s can bully people out of games well done you

During An infection game I got banned. I was crying and then once I got down low, I said oh here I am and then I fly back up and there was a lot of people flying around, tagging flying around not being tagged just like me and they didn’t get banned, but I did this game sucks, you can get it, but I suggest you don’t
I just downloaded it and I sent a message to the discord to get the stick but it is taking way to long so could you give me it my name is Dalton
can’t even join private codes and got banned for my name and it was litterally just my irl name
I would say this game has very good mods n its very fun public lobbies work amazingly i love everything the only problem was that it crashes my game for some reason and idk why but amazing game

This game is ok I got banned how well I knew that most games want you to change your name but as soon as I joined a server I got banned before I could even change my name but on the good side the mod menu is good and is in the 2023 Christmas update
YES…………………………………………….. why are you still reading? I’m not saying anything……………………………………. you can stop now. ……………………………..￼

One down fall is that it takes a while to join a lobby and when I go into city and try to go into a forest lobby I can’t join for some reason can someone please tell me who other than that the game is good gotta be quick with changing your name people
I love the mods but in public lobbies everyone just reports you and it’s so annoying
I started playing this because the game I had mod in got shut down and I would like mod because I play this game 24/7 and I can make videos and I really wanna make a stick Justice video
The game is soooooooooooooooo cool

reviews.review_title: Trust me this game is actually amazing
reviews.review_description: Half of the reviews are negative because they didn’t change there name (a common theme in gorilla tag copy’s/fan games) also yes it is required to change your name so go change ur name when u jump down from tutorial otherwise have a great time and DONT FLY TAG
